title: Complete Google sign-in and enter the workspace
description: This verifies a visitor can start Google sign-in, complete the auth callback, and reach the main workspace with synced data loaded.

steps.description: Complete the authentication flow in the browser
Verify the main workspace is displayed
Verify synced weekly data is loaded

title: Create a work block from weekly log and see it in the timeline
description: This verifies a user can add a work block by choosing a category and duration and then see it reflected in the daily timeline and weekly log.

steps.description: Switch to the weekly log view
Start adding a new work block
Select a category for the block
Choose a duration for the block
Verify the new block appears in the weekly log
Verify the block is reflected in the daily timeline

title: Switch between main tabs without losing the workspace state
description: This verifies a user can move across the core workspace tabs and keep the current planning context available.

steps.description: Switch to the weekly log view
Verify the main workspace remains available
Verify the current planning state is preserved

title: Open the main workspace from a returning session
description: This verifies an authenticated returning user can load the app and see the workspace with previously synced data available.

steps.description: Verify the main workspace is displayed
Verify previously synced weekly data is available

title: Create a habit with a weekly target and track it from a daily card
description: This verifies a user can create a habit, save it with a weekly target, and later mark completion from a daily tracking card with progress updated.

steps.description: Mark the habit as completed from a daily card
Verify the habit is available for tracking

title: View insights charts for weekly activity
description: This verifies a user can open Insights and see the heatmap and focus distribution charts rendered from stored activity.

steps.description: Verify the heatmap chart is displayed
Verify the focus distribution chart is displayed

title: View productivity insights charts
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can open the Insights tab and see the key productivity visualizations rendered from stored activity.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a focus distribution chart is displayed

title: Review existing habits and confirm daily tracking remains available
description: This verifies a returning user can open habits management and see previously created habits ready for daily tracking.

steps.description: Verify daily tracking cards are available

title: Keep insights visible after switching tabs
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can move between main tabs and return to Insights without losing the rendered productivity visualizations.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a focus distribution chart is displayed

title: Return to the app and keep cached weekly activity after restart
description: This verifies a returning user can reopen the app and still see previously logged blocks, habits, and weekly planning from cached data.

steps.description: Verify previously logged blocks are displayed
Verify saved habits and weekly planning are still available

title: Review productivity trends over time
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can open Insights and review trend-based productivity data after the charts load.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify productivity trend data is displayed

title: Return to insights without losing workspace context
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can switch from another workspace tab to Insights and still see the insights visuals available in the main workspace.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the focus distribution chart is displayed

title: View an empty insights state when no activity exists
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user with no stored activity sees an empty or no-data state in Insights instead of broken charts.

steps.description: Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify productivity charts are not displayed

title: Handle an empty first launch state
description: This verifies a new user opening the app for the first time sees an empty state instead of missing content before any data is created.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify the core workspace controls are still available

title: Reject an invalid habit target before saving
description: This verifies a user cannot save a habit when the weekly target is invalid and sees validation feedback instead.

steps.description: Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the habit is not saved
